## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new team members and provide an overview of GrowthX's operations, structure, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses a pod structure with managing editors, account managers, and writers to scale content production efficiently (10-15 pieces/week per account)](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [AI is leveraged to enable creative thinking and strategic content development, not just automation](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Onboarding process is evolving; feedback on improvements is welcome](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Work week structure: Mon-Tue prep, Wed-Thu client calls, Fri adjustments and planning](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Deya: 7 years in content, B2B sales focus, economics/MBA background, freelance since 2018](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Nemanja (NEM): 3 years in content, B2B SaaS experience, 2 years training large language models](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Kyle: Based in Oakland, father to 2-year-old, transitioning from in-house roles to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

### GrowthX Structure and Operations

  - [Recently implemented pod structure for scalability and strategic support](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Pods: Managing editors lead, with account managers and freelance writers](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Potential shift to full-time writers in the future](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Account managers involved in research, workflow execution, and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Aim: Programmatically address client feedback for scalable quality content](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)

### Content Strategy and Approach

  - [Focus on finding patterns to address feedback programmatically](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Goal: Generate quality content at scale (10-15 pieces/week per account)](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Emphasis on providing valuable insights beyond surface-level information](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Mindset shift: 70% quality can be acceptable to gather signals quickly](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Content viewed as an experimentation program to test hypotheses efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

### AI Integration and Creative Thinking

  - [AI enables rethinking workloads and enhances creative problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage AI for unique content approaches](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Balance between automation and human strategic input](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### Onboarding and Training

  - [Notion documentation available, but improvements welcome](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Circle platform being tested for new training modules](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Key resources: Recent team training video, client kickoff recordings, Airtable familiarity](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

### Work Schedule and Expectations

  - [Client calls primarily on Wednesdays and Thursdays](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Monday-Tuesday: Pre-call work and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Friday: Adjustments based on client feedback and next week planning](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Limited synchronous meeting time, focus on efficient use of call participation](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Access Fathom for team call recordings (resolve any access issues)](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Join Circle platform and begin training modules](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Review recent team training video in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Familiarize with Airtable and its use in content management](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Nemanja to connect with Elvis for account pairing and SEO expertise](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Deya to work with Jen, exploring capacity for additional support](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Both to reach out to Kyle for clarification or assistance as needed during onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/4f8EEU1zsxZeLPuVRsynxGTuRUzauRsp?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
